case_number: criminal bail application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.2973 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders on office objection For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 26.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Sadiq Khoso, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh SIP Rana Muzafar Ali & SIP Muhammad Haroon Bullo of PS Surjani Town ------------------------------------------- At the very outset, learned counsel for applicant does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction to the trial Court to conclude the trial preferably within three months. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded her no objection for issuance of such direction. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, trial Court is directed to conclude the trial expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
